---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Metis
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What are you unable to do today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about, and why they fall short.

## Spec impact

Metis is specs-first. If this touches a contract (event types, public API,
wire format, Protocol), note which spec(s) under `docs/specs/` would change.
For larger changes, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) — please
discuss the approach here before opening a PR.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art, related issues.
